title: Hornet Removal in Dobbs Ferry, NY | $350 - $550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Dobbs Ferry, Westchester. Safe, effective hornet nest elimination for $350-$550. Licensed experts serving Dobbs Ferry homes and businesses. Call today!
intro: Dealing with aggressive hornets around your Dobbs Ferry property? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, safe hornet removal services throughout Dobbs Ferry and surrounding Westchester areas. Our licensed technicians specialize in eliminating hornet nests from residential and commercial properties, ensuring your family and customers can enjoy outdoor spaces safely.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Westchester County, we understand the unique pest challenges facing Dobbs Ferry homeowners, from riverside properties to historic neighborhoods. Our trained specialists use proven methods to safely remove hornet nests while protecting your property and family, with pricing that's transparent and competitive at $350-$550.
localContext: Dobbs Ferry's beautiful tree-lined streets, proximity to the Hudson River waterfront, and mix of Victorian homes and modern residences create ideal nesting conditions for hornets, especially during warm months. From properties near Waterfront Park to homes in the historic village center, we've helped countless Dobbs Ferry residents reclaim their yards and porches from these aggressive stinging insects.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Dobbs Ferry?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Dobbs Ferry locations. Hornet nests pose serious safety risks, so we prioritize emergency calls and can typically arrive within 24 hours to assess and remove the nest safely.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough property inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and safe disposal of the nest. The final price depends on nest location, size, and accessibility.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Dobbs Ferry neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, Dobbs Ferry's mature trees, gardens, and proximity to the Hudson River create attractive nesting environments for hornets. We commonly find nests in eaves, attics, tree branches, and under porches throughout the village, particularly from late spring through early fall.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols during removal. Our technicians wear protective gear and establish safety perimeters. We recommend keeping family and pets indoors during treatment, and the area is typically safe within a few hours after service.
